summary: Android music streaming app similar to Spotify, JioSaavn, and YouTube Music
architectural_notes: Reference apps: Spotify, JioSaavn, YouTube Music for UX patterns
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Modern abstract album cover with vibrant gradients suitable for electronic music (album-electronic.dim_400x400.png)
- Album cover with acoustic guitar and warm earth tones for folk music (album-folk.dim_400x400.png)
- Bold urban street art style album cover for hip-hop music (album-hiphop.dim_400x400.png)
- Elegant classical music album cover with orchestral instruments (album-classical.dim_400x400.png)
- Energetic rock music album cover with electric guitar imagery (album-rock.dim_400x400.png)
- Minimalist portrait of a male artist in professional music studio setting (artist-male-1.dim_300x300.png)
- Portrait of a female artist with headphones in recording booth (artist-female-1.dim_300x300.png)
- Music band group photo with 4 members holding instruments (artist-band-1.dim_300x300.png)

existing_features.title: Implement music player controls with play, pause, skip forward, and skip backward functionality
Build a browsable music library interface showing songs, albums, and artists in organized views
Implement search functionality to find songs and artists by name
Create playlist management system allowing users to create, name, and add songs to custom playlists
Design a mobile-optimized responsive interface with a cohesive modern music app visual theme featuring album artwork, smooth animations, and intuitive touch-friendly controls
Display generated album artwork and artist images as static assets throughout the music library interface

new_feature_requests.summary: Music playback functionality with play/pause/skip controls
Music library browsing with songs, albums, and artists
Search functionality for finding songs and artists
Create a music library backend that stores songs with metadata including title, artist, album, duration, and audio file reference
